rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
generic_rules: Maintain consistent scope hierarchy when inserting annex blocks
Preserve existing component type and implementation structure
Use valid feature names when referencing ports in contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators such as and, or, not(...), and implication =>
anti_patterns: Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
